TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_He-ney-se, title = He-ney-se, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/He-ney-se} }

S.FORM: == kakiliman == Hanoi / He-ney "Ye-nan a kamun, Th√†nh phŠĽĎ H√† NŠĽôiÔľŹCen-pu-he-ney */?(h√†ňź n√ījňÄ) " angangan nu Ye-nan, tini IiYen-nan nutimul saamisa, Hung-hay kawanan a tukus atu Hung-hay i Tyen -te-cyang kacacubelisan, zihan Hung-hay atu Su-li-cyang alaedan a singangan. ś≤≥ŚÖßŚłā(Ť∂äŚćóŤ™ě:Th√†nh phŠĽĎ H√† NŠĽôiÔľŹŚüéŚļĮś≤≥ŚÖß*/?(h√†ňź n√ījňÄ) ) . nilaculan He-ney nu Ye-nan a kusi, lalangawan angangan, namahiza nu Ye-nan a likisian nu kasumamadan a tukay, izaw ku 1000 a mihcaan tu a likisi, makay si-yen11 se-ci malingatu nuyza Ye-nan saamisan a cen-ce, kezay atu lalangawan a angangan, tukay a likisi yadah ku tuud, yadah ku singanganay nu nazipaan nu kasumamadanay. He-ney a tademaw 800 a emang, u Cin a binacadan ami. duduc tu kasumamadan a Low-cen nikutkutan tu kasumamadan, He-ney batad nu kasumamadan a tademaw i ayaw nu tusa emang a mihcaan misan ga' tu San-yen a lalangawan. nika zikuz katenes nu demiad nayi' ku nazipaan nu tademaw itini mauzip. hakay i kung-yen ayaw nu sepat katukuh lima se-ci, He-ney a niyazu'an malingatu m uliyaw zaw ku muenengay nu tademaw. makay cin-tung-ci a zidayan katukuh mukinay a ziday, He-ney mkitaneng tu Bung-yen a lalangawan, Tung-tow a lalangawan, ciw-men a lalangawan atu ung-san a lalangawan sedpad a lamangad ayaway nu likisi a lalangawan. i lecad a zidayan nakamuan a ziday, Ye-nan iyung a zidayan. duduc tu nakamuan nu binawlan, ayaw nu kung-yen257 a mihcaan mademec tu ku Peng-pan sazikuzay a iyung, patizen g tu low-le a kanatal, pili' tu Hung-hay san-cyaw-co nu saamisan a he-mantan nu Ku-low-cin "ayzaay a He-ney-se Tung-ing- akuwan" mala baluhay a angangan. uyni a luma' mataliyukay a satabakiay a nipatizang, pisakapah patizedng hawsa yadah ku nipicukaymas tu mangelu'ay a kawaw atu lalaculan. ayaw nu kung-yen 2 se-ci, Han a ziday midemec tu saamisan nu Ye-nan, patizeng tu cyun a sakuwan. Yen-nan micumud katenes katukuh malebud a mihcaan tu Pey-su a zidayan. He-ney mikuwan tu Cyaw-ce cyun-sung-pin a kuwan. Ta-tung pitu a mkihcaan "541 a mihca", Cya-cow a kakitaan palekal tu hitay, mibahbah tu Caw-lyang a Cyaw-cow ce-Syaw-ce, mikilac nu zuma, i 544 a mihcaan tatenga'ay tu pangangan tu kungtu, patizeng tu Wan-cun kanatal, paketun tu tukay Lung-peyn "ayzaay a He-ney nu sawali nuamisan", ngangan nu likisi "ayaway a Li-caw". uyni palekal tu hitay katukuh 602 a mihcaan kya mauntin ku Suy-tang nu sakakaay a hitay ci Liw-bang. makay 20 se-ci 90 a ziday malingatu, He-ney a kusi a nisanga'an pulung nu aca nu mihcaan a kacakat a kalisiw 1991-95 a mihcaan i 19,1%, 1996-2000 a mihcaan i 15.9%, 2001-03 a mihcaan i 20.9%. namahiza, ayza izaw ku 8 ku kusi a kitizaan, misang' iza ku tabakiay a kusi a kitizaan, 16 ku tatungusay adidi'ay a kusi. makay 20 se-ci 90 a ziday malingatu, He-ney a kusi a nisanga'an pulung nu aca nu mihcaan a kacakat a kalisiw 1991-95 a mihcaan i 19,1%, 1996-2000 a mihcaan i 15.9%, 2001-03 a mihcaan i 20.9%. namahiza, ayza izaw ku 8 ku kusi a kitizaan, misang' iza ku tabakiay a kusi a kitizaan, 16 ku tatungusay adidi'ay a kusi.
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == ńßanoi / ńß…ô-n…ô "j…ô-nan a kamun, tńß*nńß pńß* ńß* n*i* ¶…ôn-pu-ńß…ô-n…ô */?(ńß** n*j*) " aŇčaŇčan nu j…ô-nan, tini iij…ôn-nan nutimur~…ĺ saamisa, ńßuŇč-ńßaj kawanan a tukus atu ńßuŇč-ńßaj i tj…ôn -t…ô- ¶jaŇč ka ¶a ¶ub…ôr~…ĺisan, zińßan ńßuŇč-ńßaj atu su-r~…ĺi- ¶jaŇč ar~…ĺa…ôdan a siŇčaŇčan. ***(***:tńß*nńß pńß* ńß* n*i******/?(ńß** n*j*) ) . nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan ńß…ô-n…ô nu j…ô-nan a kusi, r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan aŇčaŇčan, namańßiza nu j…ô-nan a r~…ĺikisian nu kasumamadan a tukaj, izaw ku **** a mińß ¶aan tu a r~…ĺikisi, makaj si-j…ôn** s…ô- ¶i mar~…ĺiŇčatu nujza j…ô-nan saamisan a ¶…ôn- ¶…ô, k…ôzaj atu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan a aŇčaŇčan, tukaj a r~…ĺikisi jadańß ku tuud, jadańß ku siŇčaŇčanaj nu nazipaan nu kasumamadanaj. ńß…ô-n…ô a tad…ômaw *** a …ômaŇč, u ¶in a bina ¶adan ami. dudu ¶ tu kasumamadan a r~…ĺow- ¶…ôn nikutkutan tu kasumamadan, ńß…ô-n…ô batad nu kasumamadan a tad…ômaw i ajaw nu tusa …ômaŇč a mińß ¶aan misan ga Ē~ ° tu san-j…ôn a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan. nika zikuz kat…ôn…ôs nu d…ômiad naji Ē~ ° ku nazipaan nu tad…ômaw itini mauzip. ńßakaj i kuŇč-j…ôn ajaw nu s…ôpat katukuńß r~…ĺima s…ô- ¶i, ńß…ô-n…ô a nijazu Ē~ °an mar~…ĺiŇčatu m ur~…ĺijaw zaw ku mu…ôn…ôŇčaj nu tad…ômaw. makaj ¶in-tuŇč- ¶i a zidajan katukuńß mukinaj a zidaj, ńß…ô-n…ô mkitan…ôŇč tu buŇč-j…ôn a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan, tuŇč-tow a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan, ¶iw-m…ôn a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan atu uŇč-san a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan s…ôdpad a r~…ĺamaŇčad ajawaj nu r~…ĺikisi a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan. i r~…ĺ…ô ¶ad a zidajan nakamuan a zidaj, j…ô-nan ijuŇč a zidajan. dudu ¶ tu nakamuan nu binawr~…ĺan, ajaw nu kuŇč-j…ôn*** a mińß ¶aan mad…ôm…ô ¶ tu ku p…ôŇč-pan sazikuzaj a ijuŇč, patiz…ôn g tu r~…ĺow-r~…ĺ…ô a kanatar~…ĺ, pir~…ĺi Ē~ ° tu ńßuŇč-ńßaj san- ¶jaw- ¶o nu saamisan a ńß…ô-mantan nu ku-r~…ĺow- ¶in "ajzaaj a ńß…ô-n…ô-s…ô tuŇč-iŇč- akuwan" mar~…ĺa bar~…ĺuńßaj a aŇčaŇčan. ujni a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° matar~…ĺijukaj a satabakiaj a nipatizaŇč, pisakapańß patiz…ôdŇč ńßawsa jadańß ku nipi ¶ukajmas tu maŇč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ °aj a kawaw atu r~…ĺar~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan. ajaw nu kuŇč-j…ôn * s…ô- ¶i, ńßan a zidaj mid…ôm…ô ¶ tu saamisan nu j…ô-nan, patiz…ôŇč tu ¶jun a sakuwan. j…ôn-nan mi ¶umud kat…ôn…ôs katukuńß mar~…ĺ…ôbud a mińß ¶aan tu p…ô-su a zidajan. ńß…ô-n…ô mikuwan tu ¶jaw- ¶…ô ¶jun-suŇč-pin a kuwan. ta-tuŇč pitu a mkińß ¶aan "*** a mińß ¶a", ¶ja- ¶ow a kakitaan par~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ tu ńßitaj, mibańßbańß tu ¶aw-r~…ĺjaŇč a ¶jaw- ¶ow ¶…ô-sjaw- ¶…ô, mikir~…ĺa ¶ nu zuma, i *** a mińß ¶aan tat…ôŇča Ē~ °aj tu paŇčaŇčan tu kuŇčtu, patiz…ôŇč tu wan- ¶un kanatar~…ĺ, pak…ôtun tu tukaj r~…ĺuŇč-p…ôn "ajzaaj a ńß…ô-n…ô nu sawar~…ĺi nuamisan", ŇčaŇčan nu r~…ĺikisi "ajawaj a r~…ĺi- ¶aw". ujni par~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ tu ńßitaj katukuńß *** a mińß ¶aan kja mauntin ku suj-taŇč nu sakakaaj a ńßitaj ¶i r~…ĺiw-baŇč. makaj ** s…ô- ¶i ** a zidaj mar~…ĺiŇčatu, ńß…ô-n…ô a kusi a nisaŇča Ē~ °an pur~…ĺuŇč nu a ¶a nu mińß ¶aan a ka ¶akat a kar~…ĺisiw ****-** a mińß ¶aan i **,*%, ****-**** a mińß ¶aan i **.*%, ****-** a mińß ¶aan i **.*%. namańßiza, ajza izaw ku * ku kusi a kitizaan, misaŇč Ē~ ° iza ku tabakiaj a kusi a kitizaan, ** ku tatuŇčusaj adidi Ē~ °aj a kusi. makaj ** s…ô- ¶i ** a zidaj mar~…ĺiŇčatu, ńß…ô-n…ô a kusi a nisaŇča Ē~ °an pur~…ĺuŇč nu a ¶a nu mińß ¶aan a ka ¶akat a kar~…ĺisiw ****-** a mińß ¶aan i **,*%, ****-**** a mińß ¶aan i **.*%, ****-** a mińß ¶aan i **.*%. namańßiza, ajza izaw ku * ku kusi a kitizaan, misaŇč Ē~ ° iza ku tabakiaj a kusi a kitizaan, ** ku tatuŇčusaj adidi Ē~ °aj a kusi.
S.FORM: == kakiliman == Hanoi / He-ney "Ye-nan a kamun, Th√†nh phŠĽĎ H√† NŠĽôiÔľŹCen-pu-he-ney */?(h√†ňź n√ījňÄ) " angangan nu Ye-nan, tini IiYen-nan nutimul saamisa, Hung-hay kawanan a tukus atu Hung-hay i Tyen -te-cyang kacacubelisan, zihan Hung-hay atu Su-li-cyang alaedan a singangan. ś≤≥ŚÖßŚłā(Ť∂äŚćóŤ™ě:Th√†nh phŠĽĎ H√† NŠĽôiÔľŹŚüéŚļĮś≤≥ŚÖß*/?(h√†ňź n√ījňÄ) ) . nilaculan He-ney nu Ye-nan a kusi, lalangawan angangan, namahiza nu Ye-nan a likisian nu kasumamadan a tukay, izaw ku 1000 a mihcaan tu a likisi, makay si-yen11 se-ci malingatu nuyza Ye-nan saamisan a cen-ce, kezay atu lalangawan a angangan, tukay a likisi yadah ku tuud, yadah ku singanganay nu nazipaan nu kasumamadanay. He-ney a tademaw 800 a emang, u Cin a binacadan ami. duduc tu kasumamadan a Low-cen nikutkutan tu kasumamadan, He-ney batad nu kasumamadan a tademaw i ayaw nu tusa emang a mihcaan misan ga' tu San-yen a lalangawan. nika zikuz katenes nu demiad nayi' ku nazipaan nu tademaw itini mauzip. hakay i kung-yen ayaw nu sepat katukuh lima se-ci, He-ney a niyazu'an malingatu m uliyaw zaw ku muenengay nu tademaw. makay cin-tung-ci a zidayan katukuh mukinay a ziday, He-ney mkitaneng tu Bung-yen a lalangawan, Tung-tow a lalangawan, ciw-men a lalangawan atu ung-san a lalangawan sedpad a lamangad ayaway nu likisi a lalangawan. i lecad a zidayan nakamuan a ziday, Ye-nan iyung a zidayan. duduc tu nakamuan nu binawlan, ayaw nu kung-yen257 a mihcaan mademec tu ku Peng-pan sazikuzay a iyung, patizen g tu low-le a kanatal, pili' tu Hung-hay san-cyaw-co nu saamisan a he-mantan nu Ku-low-cin "ayzaay a He-ney-se Tung-ing- akuwan" mala baluhay a angangan. uyni a luma' mataliyukay a satabakiay a nipatizang, pisakapah patizedng hawsa yadah ku nipicukaymas tu mangelu'ay a kawaw atu lalaculan. ayaw nu kung-yen 2 se-ci, Han a ziday midemec tu saamisan nu Ye-nan, patizeng tu cyun a sakuwan. Yen-nan micumud katenes katukuh malebud a mihcaan tu Pey-su a zidayan. He-ney mikuwan tu Cyaw-ce cyun-sung-pin a kuwan. Ta-tung pitu a mkihcaan "541 a mihca", Cya-cow a kakitaan palekal tu hitay, mibahbah tu Caw-lyang a Cyaw-cow ce-Syaw-ce, mikilac nu zuma, i 544 a mihcaan tatenga'ay tu pangangan tu kungtu, patizeng tu Wan-cun kanatal, paketun tu tukay Lung-peyn "ayzaay a He-ney nu sawali nuamisan", ngangan nu likisi "ayaway a Li-caw". uyni palekal tu hitay katukuh 602 a mihcaan kya mauntin ku Suy-tang nu sakakaay a hitay ci Liw-bang. makay 20 se-ci 90 a ziday malingatu, He-ney a kusi a nisanga'an pulung nu aca nu mihcaan a kacakat a kalisiw 1991-95 a mihcaan i 19,1%, 1996-2000 a mihcaan i 15.9%, 2001-03 a mihcaan i 20.9%. namahiza, ayza izaw ku 8 ku kusi a kitizaan, misang' iza ku tabakiay a kusi a kitizaan, 16 ku tatungusay adidi'ay a kusi. makay 20 se-ci 90 a ziday malingatu, He-ney a kusi a nisanga'an pulung nu aca nu mihcaan a kacakat a kalisiw 1991-95 a mihcaan i 19,1%, 1996-2000 a mihcaan i 15.9%, 2001-03 a mihcaan i 20.9%. namahiza, ayza izaw ku 8 ku kusi a kitizaan, misang' iza ku tabakiay a kusi a kitizaan, 16 ku tatungusay adidi'ay a kusi.

nika zikuz kat…ôn…ôs nu d…ômiad naji Ē~ ° ku nazipaan nu tad…ômaw itini mauzip. ńßakaj i kuŇč-j…ôn ajaw nu s…ôpat katukuńß r~…ĺima s…ô- ¶i, ńß…ô-n…ô a nijazu Ē~ °an mar~…ĺiŇčatu m ur~…ĺijaw zaw ku mu…ôn…ôŇčaj nu tad…ômaw. makaj ¶in-tuŇč- ¶i a zidajan katukuńß mukinaj a zidaj, ńß…ô-n…ô mkitan…ôŇč tu buŇč-j…ôn a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan, tuŇč-tow a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan, ¶iw-m…ôn a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan atu uŇč-san a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan s…ôdpad a r~…ĺamaŇčad ajawaj nu r~…ĺikisi a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan. i r~…ĺ…ô ¶ad a zidajan nakamuan a zidaj, j…ô-nan ijuŇč a zidajan. dudu ¶ tu nakamuan nu binawr~…ĺan, ajaw nu kuŇč-j…ôn*** a mińß ¶aan mad…ôm…ô ¶ tu ku p…ôŇč-pan sazikuzaj a ijuŇč, patiz…ôn g tu r~…ĺow-r~…ĺ…ô a kanatar~…ĺ, pir~…ĺi Ē~ ° tu ńßuŇč-ńßaj san- ¶jaw- ¶o nu saamisan a ńß…ô-mantan nu ku-r~…ĺow- ¶in "ajzaaj a ńß…ô-n…ô-s…ô tuŇč-iŇč- akuwan" mar~…ĺa bar~…ĺuńßaj a aŇčaŇčan. ujni a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° matar~…ĺijukaj a satabakiaj a nipatizaŇč, pisakapańß patiz…ôdŇč ńßawsa jadańß ku nipi ¶ukajmas tu ¶aw-r~…ĺjaŇč a ¶jaw- ¶ow ¶…ô-sjaw- ¶…ô, mikir~…ĺa ¶ nu zuma, i *** a mińß ¶aan tat…ôŇča Ē~ °aj tu paŇčaŇčan tu kuŇčtu, patiz…ôŇč tu wan- ¶un kanatar~…ĺ, pak…ôtun tu tukaj r~…ĺuŇč-p…ôn "ajzaaj a
